nasb.text: For you are a holy people to the Lord your God, and the Lord has chosen you to be a people for His own possession out of all the peoples who are on the face of the earth.

esv.text: For you are a people holy to the Lord your God, and the Lord has chosen you to be a people for his treasured possession, out of all the peoples who are on the face of the earth.

cnv.text: 因為你是屬於耶和華你的　神的聖潔子民；耶和華從地上的萬民中揀選了你們，特作他自己的子民。

ccb.text: 因为你们是属于你们的上帝耶和华的圣洁子民，祂从天下万族中拣选你们作祂宝贵的产业。
